query:
SELECT DISTINCT ts.id, ts.openingName, ts.deviceId, ts.userId, ts.puzzleCount, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts pa WHERE pa.trainingSetId = ts.id) as attemptCount
FROM training_sets ts 
WHERE ts.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT trainingSetId FROM puzzle_attempts)
ORDER BY attemptCount DESC;
